english translation text: Allahumma Be Rahmatika
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

O Allah, by Your mercy,
include us with the virtuous,
elevate us to be with the highly distinguished people,

arabic text: وَبِكَأْسٍ مِنْ مَعِينٍ مِنْ عَيْنٍ سَلْسَبِيلٍ فَاسْقِنَا،
english translation text: make us drink a cup of water from the spring of salsabil,
pair us with houris, by Your mercy,

arabic text: وَمِنَ الْوِلْدَانِ الْمُخَلَّدِينَ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَكْنُونٌ فَأَخْدِمْنَا،
english translation text: give us the service of the young heavenly helpers, well groomed like pearls,

arabic text: وَمِنْ ثِمَارِ الْجَنَّةِ وَلُحُومِ الطَّيْرِ فَأَطْعِمْنَا،
english translation text: feed us with the fruits of Paradise, and the flesh of birds,

arabic text: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ السُّنْدُسِ وَالْحَرِيرِ وَالإسْتَبْرَقِ فَأَلْبِسْنَا،
english translation text: and clothe us with robes of thick brocade of silk and gold.
Grant us the benefits, of the night of ordinance, and the pilgrimage to Your sacred house,
and bless us with death whilst in Your obedience.
Answer our prayers, and requests, which are good.

arabic text: وَإذَا جَمَعْتَ الأَوَّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَارْحَمْنَا،
english translation text: and when You gather the people, of the earlier and later periods, on the Day of Judgment, have mercy on us,
write for us a protection from the fire,
and do not confine us to Hell,
and do not try us through Your punishment and disgrace.
Do not feed us from the bitter tree, nor the thorny fruit (of Hell),
do not place us with the devils,

arabic text: وَفِي النَّارِ عَلَى وُجُوهِنَا فَلا تَكْبُبْنَا،
english translation text: nor throw us face first in the fire of hell,

arabic text: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ النَّارِ وَسَرَابِيلِ الْقَطِرَانِ فَلا تُلْبِسْنَا،
english translation text: and do not clothe us with the flames and tar of Hell.

arabic text: وَمِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ يَا لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،
english translation text: Save us from all evil, O there is no god but You,

arabic text: بِحَقِّ لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ فَنَجِّنَا.
english translation text: for the sake of there being no god but You, save us.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
